Ntc Of Mtn For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Continued To Feb-22-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, Motion for Preliminary Injunction. Appearances: Curtis Christy-Cirillo, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3852 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. There are no other appearances. Hearing held. Plaintiff provides proper proof of service to the Court. Also, Plaintiff's counsel advises the Court that the parties have entered into a stipulation, however, all signatures have not yet been obtained and counsel request that this matter be continued. Ruling: (The Court's tentative ruling for the next hearing will be Motion for Preliminary Injunction granted, no opposition filed.) Matter continued to February 22, 2010 to have the Court sign the stipulation and rule on the motion. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797
